gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward with a big smile, spreading arms wide to showcase the colorful objects on the screen
a person leans slightly forward, tilting the head inquisitively while raising one hand to invite guesses about the number of objects
a tutor gestures with both hands, moving them together in a sweeping motion to represent the combining of the two groups
a person raises one finger to indicate the first group and then holds up another finger for the second group, smiling as they point out the objects
a tutor counts on fingers and then opens both arms wide, inviting everyone to join in as they ask how many objects are present
a person stands with feet slightly apart, moving hands as they count aloud, emphasizing each number with a cheerful gesture
a tutor raises both arms playfully, smiling as they encourage students to think about the total from adding two and one
a person claps hands together excitedly, then gestures outward to celebrate the group work in learning about addition
a tutor nods with enthusiasm, moving one hand up and down as they reinforce the importance of counting to find totals in addition
